form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 3rd over 510m at this track beaten 4 lengths (28.91) behind Lakeview Liam in a Grade 4/5 on April 5. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 3rd over 510m at this track beaten 4 lengths (28.91) behind Lakeview Liam in a Grade 4/5 on April 5. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warragul over 460m. Last start finished 5th on April 9 over 515m at Sandown behind Lindenow Buster beaten 9 lengths (30.05) in a Grade 5. Has an exceptional 28.68 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.25) when eighth over 460m at Warragul in a Grade 4/5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and six places from 14 starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage second but before that won by 1.3 lengths at Warragul (26.08) beating Escaping Bindi in a Grade 5 on March 31. Solid chance with even luck.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 4/5 at this track when a 2.25 lengths second but did run a slick 28.81 over the 510m journey. Can measure up with a repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Jumped well at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at Sandown last start over 515m. In form and another win would not surprise.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.84) when fourth over 400m at Warragul in a Grade 4/5. Strong record off the draw with three wins and two minors from six starts. Looks a key chance on best form.
